name: gadd
description: Governed Autonomy skills for product, design, planning, decomposition, implementation, verification, and closure handoffs.

commands.purpose: Bootstrap GADD files and local ledger support in a target repository.
Read repo-local ledger state and report the next GADD command.
Normalize unclassified intake and route a Work Item to implementation, SDD, PRD discovery, or a terminal state.
Gather PM-grade inputs, codebase facts, and sanitized readiness evidence before scoping.
Write PRD goals, non-goals, and initial constraints.
Fill product detail inside the approved scope.
Make the PRD testable and ready for engineering design review.
Approve a PRD or SDD gate from repo-local ledger state.
Write the SDD and apply the ADR threshold.
Write the implementation plan and generated HTML review copy.
Create child vertical-slice tickets from an approved plan.
Implement one ready child vertical-slice ticket with code and tests.
Verify one implemented child ticket is ready for human-approved closure.
Apply human-approved closure for one verified child ticket or a closeable parent roll-up.
Optionally archive closed GADD ticket files after workflow closure.

codex.install: Use $skill-installer with the canonical skill paths in this manifest.
